Queries.Name: FeatureUsage_v3
Queries.Query: SELECT u.UserName, f.FeatureName, f.LastUsed, f.UsageCount FROM FeatureUsage f JOIN Users u ON f.UserID = u.ID WHERE f.LastUsed > DATEADD(day, -30, GETDATE())

Queries.Name: FeatureUsage_v2
Queries.Query: SELECT UserID, FeatureName, LastUsed, UsageCount FROM FeatureUsage WHERE LastUsed > DATEADD(day, -30, GETDATE())
SELECT FeatureName, COUNT(*) as UsageCount FROM FeatureLog WHERE LogDate > DATEADD(day, -30, GETDATE()) GROUP BY FeatureName
